🔬 BENCHMARK REPORT 2025-08-19: Your commands have been scientifically roasted

SCIENTIFIC VERDICT: CATASTROPHIC OVER-ENGINEERING EPIDEMIC

📊 BRUTAL STATISTICS:
• 100% of commands violate CLAUDE.md simplicity standards  
• Average complexity: 4.8x the acceptable limit (24/5)
• Success rate: 76% (worse than random chance on some)
• Token waste: 642 average per execution

🏆 SAVAGE AWARDS:
• Most Over-Engineered: git-backup-sync.md (41 complexity points!)
• Least Reliable: adhd-context-switch.md (40% success rate)
• Token Waster: git-backup-sync.md (893 tokens to sync git)
• Pleasant Surprise: context-enhanced-executor.md (actually works)

🔥 SCIENTIFIC ROASTS:
• git-backup-sync.md: 8 strategy patterns for 'git pull'? Built a space shuttle to cross the street.
• adhd-context-switch.md: 40% success rate. Coin flip would be more reliable.
• adhd-morning-assistant.md: AI planning AI planning. 5-year-old with sticky note has better success rate.

💀 THE BOTTOM LINE:
Your commands prove that with enough engineering effort, any simple task can become unreliable, expensive, and over-complex. Achievement unlocked: Exact opposite of every software engineering principle.

📋 EVIDENCE-BASED RECOMMENDATIONS:
1. DELETE git-backup-sync.md immediately (complexity score is criminal)
2. Replace adhd-context-switch.md with Notepad.exe (100% more reliable)
3. Keep context-enhanced-executor.md (only working command)
4. Read CLAUDE.md (apparently nobody has)

Full scientific report: .github/benchmarks/results/20250819-060351-report.json
